% Auto-generated PGFPlots template — grouped horizontal bars
% Data: new_plots/data/avg_actions_between_resets_wide.csv

% ------- configurable knobs -------
% overall size
\newcommand{\AABRPlotWidth}{0.6\linewidth}
% compute plot height from bin size and number of categories
\newlength{\AABRBinHeight} \setlength{\AABRBinHeight}{8pt} % vertical space allocated per category
\newcommand{\AABRNumCats}{43} % update if symbolic y list changes
\newcommand{\AABRPlotHeight}{\dimexpr \AABRNumCats\AABRBinHeight\relax}
% typography
\newcommand{\AABRFont}{\scriptsize}
\newcommand{\AABRYFont}{\tiny}
% bar geometry
\newlength{\AABRBarWidth} \setlength{\AABRBarWidth}{2pt}
\newlength{\AABRBarSep}   \setlength{\AABRBarSep}{\AABRBarWidth} % center-to-center spacing so adjacent bars touch
% margins around data to create visual breathing room
\newcommand{\AABREnlargeY}{0.03}
\newcommand{\AABREnlargeX}{0.04}
% ---------------------------------

\begin{tikzpicture}
      \begin{axis}[
                  title={Average Actions Between Resets},
                  xlabel={Actions (symlog recommended)},
                  tick label style={font=\AABRFont},
                  yticklabel style={font=\AABRYFont},
                  ytick=data,
                  % modern, ggplot-like styling
                  grid=none,
                  axis background/.style={fill={rgb,255:red,243; green,246; blue,255}}, % very light blue
                  axis lines=left,
                  axis line style={draw=black!50,-},
                  x axis line style={-},
                  y axis line style={-},
                  tick style={draw=none},
                  legend style={font=\AABRFont, draw=none, fill=none},
                  legend pos=outer north east,
                  label style={font=\AABRFont},
                  title style={font=\AABRFont},
                  width=\AABRPlotWidth,
                  height=\AABRPlotHeight,
                  xmin=0,
                  symbolic y coords={ants, bbq, blicket, block_breaker, buoyancy, carrace, chinese_checkers, chomp, colour_lines, crystallization, diffusion, dino, disease, egg, exp_particles, gameoflife, gravity, gravity_3, grow, ice, kaleidoscope, lightning_rod, lights_new, logic_gates, magnets, mario, masters_logic, minesweeper, nim, pacman, paint, particles, peg_solitaire, ricochet_robots, sand, scotland_yard, set, snake, space_invaders, tictactoe, twiddle, waterplug, wind},
                  yticklabel={\expandafter\obfsname\expandafter{\tick}},
                  y dir=reverse,
                  bar width=\AABRBarWidth,
                  enlarge y limits=\AABREnlargeY,
                  enlarge x limits={upper, value=\AABREnlargeX},
            ]
            % grouped bars per environment with distinct, ggplot-like colors
            \addplot+[xbar, bar shift=\dimexpr-1\AABRBarSep\relax, draw=none, mark=none, fill={rgb,255:red,86; green,180; blue,233}] table [x=claude-4-sonnet, y=environment, col sep=comma] {new_plots/data/avg_actions_between_resets_wide.csv};
            \addplot+[xbar, bar shift=\dimexpr 0\AABRBarSep\relax, draw=none, mark=none, fill={rgb,255:red,230; green,159; blue,0}]   table [x=gemini-2.5-pro, y=environment, col sep=comma] {new_plots/data/avg_actions_between_resets_wide.csv};
            \addplot+[xbar, bar shift=\dimexpr 1\AABRBarSep\relax, draw=none, mark=none, fill={rgb,255:red,0;   green,158; blue,115}] table [x=human, y=environment, col sep=comma] {new_plots/data/avg_actions_between_resets_wide.csv};
            \legend{{claude-4-sonnet}, {gemini-2.5-pro}, {human}}
      \end{axis}
\end{tikzpicture}
